[157.080-434.930] interviewee: taking them in, they said, oh, he is sick or something, and they released him. They would rather release him instead of keeping him in the officer school. But with me, it was different. It was in a small town. Everybody knew me. I was a very well known athlete in soccer and in tennis. So they couldn't refuse it. So they were supposed to take me to the sanitary, to the medical corps, but I don't know if it was on purpose or by mistake, this short name for

refuse it. So
